# La Mettrie

*1709 – 1751 · French*

French materialist physician and philosopher: in "Man a Machine", he reduces mind to the body's organization and treats the living being as a mechanism.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
